mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, user_nm AS userNm, pwd, user_email AS userEmail, user_status AS userStatus, role_id AS roleId FROM USERS WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS (user_id, user_nm, pwd, user_email, role_id, user_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userNm}, #{pwd}, #{userEmail}, 1, 'ACTIVE')
